meaning: n.[植]乳汁细胞,乳汁管,乳汁器
examples: In the epicormic shoot stem which passed a growth season, the secondary laticifer differentiation of all the extension parts was accelerated by JA application.
The girth, latex yield, laticifer number and wind tolerance of 1981 IRRDB rubber tree germplasm planted in 1987 were observed.
By assaying the activities of the cut, chitinase, an important defense protein in the laticifer, was traced after bark wounding.
